title: Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds Game Releases Like a Dragon's Majima Free DLC
content: Sega announced on Tuesday that it will add the free DLC content of Goro Majima as Captain Majima from Like a Dragon: Pirate Yakuza in Hawaii to its Sonic Racing CrossWorlds racing game on Wednesday at 8:00 p.m. EDT.
author: ANN

title: The Ayakashi Hunter's Tainted Bride Gets 2nd Manga Spinoff on May 26
content: The June issue of Kodansha 's Monthly Shonen Sirius magazine revealed on April 24 that Tsugaru Toba and Sen Izumino will launch a short manga spinoff of Midori Yūma 's The Ayakashi Hunter's Tainted Bride ( Kizumono no Hanayome ) novels titled Kōtō Onmyō Gakkō Kizumono no Hanayome Gaiden (Imperial City Onmyo School:…
author: ANN

title: Major Dragon Ball Games Are Making Controversial Changes, And Here’s Why
content: Like so many other anime franchises, the Dragon Ball series has found serious success in the digital landscape. For decades, you’d be hard-pressed not to see Goku and his fellow Z-Fighters arrive on various consoles, with mobile devices helping the shonen series to stretch its legs.
author: ComicBook

title: Every Dragon Ball Super Arc Ranked By How Much They’ll Be Improved With Anime Remake
content: Dragon Ball Super is now in the works on a brand new remake anime series taking on the original TV series from the Battle of Gods arc, and it’s going to be a big improvement on what was seen before .
author: ComicBook

title: Anime Expo Hosts Votoms Director Ryōsuke Takahashi, Animators Tōru Yoshida, Moriyasu Taniguchi
content: Anime Expo announced on Tuesday that it will host anime director Ryōsuke Takahashi and animators Tōru Yoshida and Moriyasu Taniguchi as guests. Takahashi directed and created the original concept for the 1981 anime Fang of the Sun Dougram , and the 1983 Armored Trooper Votoms anime.
author: ANN

title: New Attack on Titan Orchestral Concert Tour Travels to 15 Venues Worldwide
content: The Wild Faery Company announced on Monday that it will hold an orchestral concert for the Attack on Titan anime franchise 's soundtrack titled " Attack on Titan - Symphony from Paradis." The concert will debut at the Royal Albert Hall in London on October 17, and will travel to a total of 15 venues around the world.
author: ANN

title: Crunchyroll Hypes New Reincarnated as a Slime Movie With Sneak Peek Clip (Exclusive)
content: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime is coming to theaters this week with a brand new movie, and Crunchyroll is gearing up for the movie’s release with an exclusive sneak peek clip for That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime the Movie: Tears of the Azure Sea .
author: ComicBook

title: Crossed Hearts Licenses OctoPiece Manga
content: Crossed Hearts , a new California-based global English publisher , announced on Wednesday that it has licensed Mitomo Sasako's OctoPiece manga. The company describes the story: Set on the remote island nation of Arakam, where military might and faith stand as twin pillars of rule, this dark fantasy follows Yuzuki, a…
author: ANN

title: Ball and Chain Manga Ends with Next Volume
content: The fifth compiled book volume of Q-ta Minami 's Ball and Chain announced on Tuesday the series will end in the next volume. Manga Mavericks is publishing the series in English and describes the story: "Maybe I could have chosen something different..." Keito is a late-20s company employee who's planning to get married…
author: ANN

title: Invincible Season 5 Confirms 2027 Release With Promising Update
content: Invincible is now in the works on Season 5 of the animated series for Prime Video, and has confirmed that it’s going to be making its comeback next year with a promising update on how the new episodes are coming along so far.
author: ComicBook
